hero.title: Transport, moving & delivery services in one place
hero.sub: FP Express handles your transport from start to finish.
serviceCategory.kappaletavara.label: Item transport
serviceCategory.kappaletavara.cardDescri: Washing machine, sofa and bed. 0–40 km €89, over 40 km +€1.29/km. Floor surcharge without elevator €5/floor.
serviceCategory.projekti.label: Moving & recycling
serviceCategory.projekti.cardDescription: Moving from €269 and recycling from €54.99. Starting price includes 40 km, additional kilometres €0.69/km.
serviceCategory.ajoneuvo.label: Vehicle transport
serviceCategory.ajoneuvo.cardDescription: Motorcycles, ATVs, lawn mowers and mopeds. 0–40 km €129, 41–80 km €169, thereafter €1.29/km.
calculator.goods_info: Washing machine, sofa, bed. 0-40 km €89, over 40 km +€1.29/km.
calculator.vehicle_info: Motorcycles, ATVs, lawnmowers, mopeds. 0-40 km €129, 41-80 km €169, then €1.29/km.
calculator.vehicle_extra: Extra bike delivery to same location €89.
calculator.error_missing_address: Please enter both pickup and delivery address.
calculator.error_connection: Connection error to distance service. Try again.
form.name: Name
form.complete_and_checkout: Complete your details and continue to checkout. You can review your order before payment.
form.send_quote_or_order: You can send a quote request or order directly when the price is calculated.
form.response_same_day: We usually respond the same day
form.next_step_checkout: Next step: review details at checkout
form.next_step_confirm: Next step: review details at checkout and confirm payment.
form.error_server: Server did not respond. Check your connection and try again.
form.error_address_match: Pickup and delivery address must match the calculator.
form.error_checkout: Checkout redirect failed. Please try again.
calculator.order_via_form: Order and payment via the form below.
calculator.hero_sub: Select a service category and check the estimated price. The final price is always confirmed in the quote.
service_page.flexible: We also serve flexibly on weekends. Tell us your needs and we'll suggest a suitable schedule and transport solution.
services.pyorakuljetus.title: Motorcycle transport
services.pyorakuljetus.description: Fast and safe motorcycle transport throughout Finland.
services.pyorakuljetus.valueProposition: We transport motorcycles carefully secured and on time to the agreed address.
services.monkijakuljetus.title: ATV transport
services.monkijakuljetus.description: Reliable ATV transport to your cottage, for service or sale.
services.monkijakuljetus.valuePropositio: ATVs arrive safely and on schedule.
services.monkijakuljetus.includes.0: Pickup from yard, storage or shop
services.monkijakuljetus.includes.3: Option for additional stops on the same route
services.pesukone-kuljetus.title: Washing machine transport
services.pesukone-kuljetus.description: Washing machine pickup and transport safely to a new address.
services.pesukone-kuljetus.valueProposit: We handle the washing machine move quickly without you needing to arrange transport.
services.pesukone-kuljetus.includes.0: Pickup from seller or old home
services.sohvan-kuljetus.title: Sofa transport
services.sohvan-kuljetus.description: Sofa pickup and delivery without damage.
services.sohvan-kuljetus.valuePropositio: We transport sofas from shops, homes and storage.
services.sohvan-kuljetus.includes.3: Option to combine multiple items in one transport
services.sangyn-kuljetus.title: Bed transport
services.sangyn-kuljetus.description: Bed and frame transport smoothly to a new location.
services.sangyn-kuljetus.valuePropositio: We move beds and mattresses to home, cottage or storage.
services.kierratys.title: Recycling service
services.kierratys.description: Recycling service from €54.99 incl. VAT. Starting price includes 40 km.
services.kierratys.valueProposition: An easy way to responsibly get rid of extra items.
services.kierratys.includes.1: Sorting and transport to recycling points
services.muutot.title: Moving services
services.muutot.description: Flexible moving for homes and small businesses from €269 incl. VAT. Starting price includes 40 km.
services.muutot.valueProposition: You focus on your new home – we handle the move.
services.muutot.includes.3: Option for extra trips and intermediate stops
services.venesiirto.title: Boat transport
services.venesiirto.description: Seasonal boat transport safely from harbour to harbour.
services.venesiirto.valueProposition: We transport boats planned during spring and autumn peak seasons with the right equipment.
services.venesiirto.includes.2: Delivery to destination harbour or storage
